EXPLANATION: The cited paper is a real work, but the citation contains minor title and author list discrepancies (a missing author and formatting differences). The cited paper is clearly identifiable as "MACE-OFF: Transferable Short Range Machine Learning Force Fields for Organic Molecules" published on arXiv.
